verify.rule: All required fields are present.
The estimated mass is within acceptable limits.

risk.desc: Potential structural weakness in the bell_nozzle_shell due to cutaway window.
risk.mit: Add reinforcing ribs or stiffeners around the cutaway window.

risk.desc: Risk of thermal stress on the bell_nozzle_shell from prolonged exposure to heat.
risk.mit: Implement thermal management strategies such as insulation or cooling channels.

risk.desc: Difficulty in removing the engine_display_cartridge if the bolt_circle_dummy is not properly aligned.
risk.mit: Ensure precise alignment and clear markings for the bolt_circle_dummy.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment issues between the bell_nozzle_shell and the stage_engine_mock due to rotational DOF.
risk.mit: Include alignment keys or datum pins to ensure proper orientation.

risk.desc: Risk of damage to internal components during assembly due to lack of strain relief for cables.
risk.mit: Incorporate strain relief features at every cable exit point.

physics_paths.description: Access for removal and installation of the engine display cartridge.
Shell provides insulation and cooling for the engine display cartridge.
Allows viewing of the internal components through a cutaway section.

integration_opportunities.description: Increase size of cutaway window for better visualization.
Add additional ribs or stiffeners to the bell_nozzle_shell.
Use lighter materials where feasible without compromising strength.

verification_focus.description: Verify that the bell_nozzle_shell maintains structural integrity under simulated launch conditions.
Ensure that the engine_display_cartridge can be easily removed and reinstalled.
Validate that the shell effectively manages thermal loads during operation.

risk.desc: The turbopump assembly dummy may not accurately represent the actual turbopump's size and shape.

risk.mit: Verify the placement of the slide rail during design reviews.

risk.desc: Inadequate strain relief for cables exiting the turbopump assembly dummy could lead to damage.
risk.mit: Implement strain relief geometry for all cable exits.

risk.desc: Inspection labels might become obscured or damaged over time, reducing visibility.
risk.mit: Use durable materials for inspection labels and ensure they are placed in easily visible locations.

risk.desc: Failure to maintain proper clearance around connectors could result in mis-mating or damage.
risk.mit: Ensure connectors are accessible and properly keyed or labeled.
